ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency of the dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the dataset */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the dataset */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the dataset */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates for the dataset */,
  "data_vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the dataset */,
  "data_category" TEXT /* Category of the dataset (e.g., stocks, forex, futures) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data point belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the data point */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the data point */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the data point */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the data point */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the data point */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the data point */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid out by the data point */,
  "split" REAL /* Split factor of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the source */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_assets" (
  "portfolio_asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio asset */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the asset belongs to */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the asset in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price the asset was purchased at */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_assets_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_assets_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., stock, bond, ETF) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange the asset is listed on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the alert is for */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification for the alert (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_history" (
  "alert_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert history entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert the entry belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "triggered" INTEGER /* Whether the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_history_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the trade belongs to */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the trade is for */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was made */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price the asset was traded at */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the entry belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the performance metrics were calculated */,
  "return" REAL /* Return of the portfolio on the given date */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the portfolio on the given date */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the portfolio on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)
